name: inventory-stock
description: Adds quantity tracking to inventory items: amount on hand, unit, storage location, and low-stock threshold

keywords.description: Displays current stock quantity with unit (e.g. '3 sides'). Turns red below reorder threshold.

endpoints.name: get_stock
endpoints.description: Get a single stock entry by ID

endpoints.name: create_stock
endpoints.description: Create a stock entry for an inventory item

endpoints.name: update_stock
endpoints.description: Update quantity, unit, location, or threshold

tables.name: inventory_stock_items
tables.description: Stock quantities and locations for inventory items
